subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! That which thou hadst written was noted. Praise be to God that the holy fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید حمد خدا را که نفحات قدس
subcodes.subjects: @importance of authoritative interpretation, @firmness in the Covenant, @literal interpretation, @exhortations and counsels
